SQL> VAR v_clob CLOB SQL> BEGIN dbms_workload_replay.compare_period_report(replay_id1 => 13, replay_id2 => null, format => DBMS_WORKLOAD_REPLAY.TYPE_HTML, result => :v_clob); END; 2 / PL/SQL procedure successfully completed. SQL> print v_clob; Compare Period Report
Compare Period Report: Capture vs. Replay

Collapse all sections Expand all sections

This report compares the performance of a workload replay against the per formance of the original captured system. Throughout the report "Capture&qu ot; refers to the original captured system, while "Replay" refers to t he replayed workload. The most reliable experiment would compare two replays. Th e first replay would try to mimic the captured system as much as possible withou t any system changes. The second replay would be similar to the first while appl ying a single change as the test variable. (Test systems are almost always an ap proximation of production. The idea in comparing two replays is to isolate the c hange we want to apply and thus assess the effect of such a change on a system s imilar to production.)

(+) (-) General Information

This section describes the experimental setup. Check it carefully to verify that the intended experiment was performed.

(+) (-) Data Sources

Capture Replay
Capture/Replay name donot_delete_sandata_oci_stxprd_capture001 RAT_REPLAY_TUNING_02FEB2025
Capture/Replay ID 131 13
Data Directory Name RAT_REPLAY_TUNING RAT_REPLAY_TUNING
Directory Path /acfs01/acfs/RAT_REPLY/sandata_oci_stxprd_capture001 /acfs01/acfs/RAT_REPLY/sandata_oci_stxprd_capture001
PL/SQL Mode TOP_LEVEL TOP_LEVEL
Encryption Algorithm

(+) (-) Information About Databases

Capture Replay
Database Name STXPRD STXPRD
Original Database ID 3287654263 3287654263
Version 19.0.0.0.0 19.0.0.0.0
Platform Linux x86 64-bit Linux x86 64-bit
Is It RAC? NO YES
Number of Instances 1 2

(+) (-) Replay Divergence

This section describes the divergence in replay compared to the capture d system. Please look at the full divergence report if this report shows signifi cant divergence. The possible divergence levels are: (NONE) no divergence detect ed at all (LOW) minimal divergence detected but the performance comparison is mo st likely still valid (MEDIUM) some non-trivial divergence is detected and the p erformance comparison is suspect (HIGH) severe divergence detected and the perfo rmance comparison is unlikely to be informative.

Divergence Level Percent of Calls That Diverged
Replay Divergence (compared to Capture) LOW 1.14%

(+) (-) Main Performance Statistics

This section does a high-level performance comparison of the two period s. Start by looking for a change in Database Time. If there is no significant c hange in Database Time, you can assume performance as a whole is similar. You ca n look for a change in the Database Time pieces that follow (CPU, User I/O, and Cluster) to see how the different ingredients of Database Time changed from one period to the next, either to explain a change in Database Time or to see if som e pieces regressed and others improved.

Change in DB time Capture total time Replay total time Capture % of DB time Replay % of DB time
Database Time 11.53% 817885.54 seconds 912200.62 seconds 100 100
CPU Time 21.21% 712338.58 seconds 863455.6 seconds 87.1 94.66
User I/O Wait Time 128.29% 79831.97 seconds 182247.93 seconds 9.76 19.98
Cluster Wait Time N/A 0 seconds 3567.88 seconds 0 .39

(+) (-) Top SQL/Call

(+) (-) Top SQL by Change in DB Time

This section compares the performance change of individual SQL statem ents from one period to the next. SQL statements are identified by their force m atching signature to account for literal usage. They are ordered by the total c hange in DB Time, as the most relevant changes are those that impact total throu ghput the most. Any SQL tuning you do should begin with the statement that regre ssed by the most DB Time.

(+) (-) Top Call by Change in DB Time

This section compares the performance change of individual database c alls from one period to the next. A call is identified by File ID and Call Count er. They are ordered by the change in DB Time, as the most relevant changes are those that impact total throughput the most. SQL_ID and SQL text are displayed f or information purpose about the call. Any SQL tuning you do should begin with t he statement that regressed by the most DB Time.

(+) (-) Hardware Usage Comparison

(+) (-) CPU Usage

This section describes general CPU usage on the systems and helps ass ess if they were CPU bound. The number of CPUs is summed over all instances. CPU usage is averaged over instances. Note that "Oracle Run-queue Load" i s for Oracle processes only and usually underestimates the run-queue part.

system CPU Sockets/Cores/Threads Hosts' CPU Usage Oracle Sessions on CPU Oracle Run-queue Load
Capture 1/16/32 36.93% 11.38 active sessions .75 active sessions
Replay 4/32/32 50.74% 13.56 active sessions 0 active sessions

(+) (-) I/O to Data and Temp Files

This section shows some basic I/O statistics about data and temp file s. First look at the single block read time. An I/O bound system will show a hig h value (much more than 10 miliseconds). The total read/write rates should provi de some guidance to determine if high single-block latencies are caused by an ex cess of requests from the database or poor I/O throughput in general.

Capture Replay
average time of single block read (miliseconds) .08 .14
total number of single block reads 158922520 38781651
total physical read 3994.546 G 15204.771 G
total physical write 2351.177 G 439.53 G
read rate 63.108M per sec 240.269M per sec
write rate 37.145M per sec 6.946M per sec

(+) (-) Interconnect Usage

This section describes interconnect usage. When the interconnect is n ot too loaded the response times of relatively fast requests should be under one milisecond. When available, the ping time should indicate if the interconnect i s too loaded. It represents the round-trip time for a request and an 8Kb respons e. Fast grants are grant requests that did not encounter any extra processing (n ot busy nor congested). They should be the fastest global cache requests. If the y are slow, the interconnect is too loaded. Even fast block transfers (i.e., not busy nor congested) should be under one milisecond.

Capture Replay
average 8Kb ping time (miliseconds) Not RAC 8.72
average fast grant time (miliseconds) Not RAC .1
average fast block transfer time (miliseconds) Not RAC .12
total GC blocks transferred Not RAC 266178312
total interconnect usage (G bits) Not RAC 28162.859
interconnect throughput (M bits per second) Not RAC 445.04

(+) (-) ADDM Comparison

This section provides a comparison of ADDM analyses of the two time per iods ordered by the absolute difference in impact. By comparing ADDM results for the two periods, you can see problems that existed in one but not the other, as well as a change in individual finding impacts. If your change is intended to improve database throughput, you should see that improvement reflected in the AD DM findings and impacts.

impact (sec) average active sessions percent active sessions

(+) (-) SELECT * FROM (SELECT cl ient_name,worker_name,visit_date,b_dtime,e_dtime,beg_call_dtime,end_call_dtime,c lientkey,visitkey,workerkey,schkey,loc,stx_id,stx.lib.FormatSantraxId(stx_id,acc ount) formatted_stx_id,update_id,vis_explain,vis1_explain,vis2_explain,sch_hours _char,pay_hours_char,act_hours_char,memo,memo_column,client_unknown,excp_explain ,spv,category,contract,task_count,ot_ab_code,client_phone,worker_phone,worker_un known,gps_phone_type,addressvalidation,bill_hours_char,beg_adj_dtime,end_adj_dti me,service,service_description,excp1_explain,ot_ab_hours_char,medicaid_id,compna me,adj_hours_char,visit_status,call_in_location,call_out_location,payor_id,payor _name,program,stx.lib.GetVisitTzName(visitkey) as timezone,excp1_ack_explain,exc p_ack_explain, ani, NVL(beg_call_dtime, end_call_dtime) AS call_dtime, bill_unit s ,visit_group_code,visit_group_guid, contgy_plan_code, sch_explain, jurisdictio n_id, jurisdiction_desc, OfflineInd, worker_id_custom1 ,lib.DecodeExcpExplain(ex cp_explain, NULL, excp1_explain) AS excp_order,att_id, count(*) OVER () AS total _rows, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dti me,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj _dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,end_call_dtime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) ) AS row_number FROM ( SELECT /*+ index(v visits_pk) leading(x) use_nl(x v) */ v.visitkey, v.account, v.schkey, v.clientkey, v.workerkey, v.vis_explain, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain, nvl(v.update_id,0) AS update_id, v.visit_date, v.visit_edate, s.b_dtime, s.e_dtime, v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.pay_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(stx.lib.schedhours(s.b_dtime,s.e_dtime,s.duty_free) ,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS sch_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectoc(lib.diffhours(v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.vi sitkey) ),1,5) AS act_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.pay_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS pay_hours_char , substr(stx.lib.getfullname(c.f_name,c.l_name,stx.lib.getphonenum(v.ani) ),1, 64) AS client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, cs.client_priority, w.stx_id, w.att_id, nvl(TO_CHAR(w.phonenum),ws.phone) AS worker_phone, c.spv, nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) AS contract, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcp1explain( v.excp1_explain, v.vis2_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp1_mask(v.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.ser vice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp1_explain, v.visit_group_code, v.visit_group_guid, s.ctrl_num as sch_ctrl_num, s.contgy_plan_code, s.sch_explain, x.jurisdiction_id, CASE WHEN x.jurisdiction_id IS NOT NULL THEN stx.lib.getJurisdictionDesc(stx.lib.GetBE_Guid(x.account), x.jurisdictio n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.beg_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_in_location, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.end_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_out_location FROM stx.gtt_vm_visits x JOIN stx.visits v ON v.visitkey=x.visitkey JOIN stx.accounts_info a ON v.account = a.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_interfaces ai ON v.account = ai.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_setup acs ON v.account = acs.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_proc ap ON v.account = ap.account LEFT JOIN stx.schedule s ON v.schkey = s.schkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers w ON v.workerkey = w.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers_supp ws ON v.workerkey = ws.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients c ON v.clientkey = c.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients_supp cs ON v.clientkey = cs.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.payor p on p.payor_id=x.payor_id WHERE stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='2070' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2024-10-31 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2024-11-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_edate >= to_date('2024-11-01 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_status NOT IN ('Ignored') AND (excp_explain <> 0 OR excp1_expl ain <> 0) ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call _dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dt ime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) , visitkey ) a WHERE row _number BETWEEN 1 AND 50 SELECT * FROM (SELECT client_name,worke r_name,visit_date,b_d [...]

client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcp1explain( v.excp1_explain, v.vis2_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp1_mask(v.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.ser vice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp1_explain, v.visit_group_code, v.visit_group_guid, s.ctrl_num as sch_ctrl_num, s.contgy_plan_code, s.sch_explain, x.jurisdiction_id, CASE WHEN x.jurisdiction_id IS NOT NULL THEN stx.lib.getJurisdictionDesc(stx.lib.GetBE_Guid(x.account), x.jurisdictio n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.beg_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_in_location, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.end_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_out_location FROM stx.gtt_vm_visits x JOIN stx.visits v ON v.visitkey=x.visitkey JOIN stx.accounts_info a ON v.account = a.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_interfaces ai ON v.account = ai.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_setup acs ON v.account = acs.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_proc ap ON v.account = ap.account LEFT JOIN stx.schedule s ON v.schkey = s.schkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers w ON v.workerkey = w.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers_supp ws ON v.workerkey = ws.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients c ON v.clientkey = c.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients_supp cs ON v.clientkey = cs.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.payor p on p.payor_id=x.payor_id WHERE stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='2070' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2024-10-31 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2024-11-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_edate >= to_date('2024-11-01 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_status NOT IN ('Ignored') AND (excp_explain <> 0 OR excp1_expl ain <> 0) ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call _dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dt ime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) , visitkey ) a WHERE row _number BETWEEN 1 AND 50 AND loc IS NOT NULL SELECT loc FROM (SELECT client_name,wor ker_name,visit_date,b [...]

(+) (-) WITH MAIN_QUERY AS ( SEL ECT AUTH.AUTH_ID, AUTH.AUTH_STATUS_ID, AUTH.ACCOUNT, AUTH.LOC, (CASE WHEN AUTH.B EG_DATE <= SYSDATE AND (AUTH.END_DATE IS NULL OR AUTH.END_DATE >= TRUNC(SY SDATE)) THEN 0 WHEN AUTH.BEG_DATE > SYSDATE THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS INCLUDE, (S ELECT C.F_NAME FROM STX.CLIENTS C WHERE C.ACCOUNT = AUTH.ACCOUNT AND C.LOC = AUT H.LOC AND C.END_DATE = PKG_AUTH_V8.GETCLIENTASOFDATE(AUTH.ACCOUNT, AUTH.LOC, GRE ATEST(:B9 , AUTH.BEG_DATE)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS F_NAME, (SELECT C.L_NAME FROM STX .CLIENTS C WHERE C.ACCOUNT = AUTH.ACCOUNT AND C.LOC = AUTH.LOC AND C.END_DATE = PKG_AUTH_V8.GETCLIENTASOFDATE(AUTH.ACCOUNT, AUTH.LOC, GREATEST(:B9 , AUTH.BEG_DA TE)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS L_NAME, (SELECT C.SPV FROM STX.CLIENTS C WHERE C.ACCOUNT = AUTH.ACCOUNT AND C.LOC = AUTH.LOC AND C.END_DATE = PKG_AUTH_V8.GETCLIENTASOFD ATE(AUTH.ACCOUNT, AUTH.LOC, GREATEST(:B9 , AUTH.BEG_DATE)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SP V, AUTH.AUTH_REF_NUMBER, AUTH.PAYOR_ID, AL.PROGRAM, AL.SERVICE, (SELECT DESCRIPT ION FROM STX.ACCOUNTS_SERVICES SRV WHERE SRV.ACCOUNT = AUTH.ACCOUNT AND SRV.SERV ICE = AL.SERVICE AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SERVICE_DESCRIPTION, TRUNC(AL.BEG_TIME) AS B EG_DATE, TRUNC(AL.END_TIME) AS END_DATE, AUTH.AUTH_LIMIT_TYPE_ID, AUTH_TYPE.AUTH _TYPE_NAME, AUTHLIMITTYPE.AUTH_LIMIT_TYPE_NAME, AUTH.AUTH_LIMIT_MAX, AL.AUTH_LIM IT_ID, AUTH.CLIENT_SERVICE_PRI_CODE, ( SELECT CLIENT_SERVICE_PRI_DESC FROM ACCOU NTS_GROUPS_SETUP ACS JOIN BE_SETUP BS ON ACS.GROUPKEY = BS.GROUPKEY JOIN BE_CLIE NT_SERVICE_PRI BL ON BL.BE_GUID = BS.BE_GUID WHERE ACS.ACCOUNT =AUTH.ACCOUNT AND BL.CLIENT_SERVICE_PRI_CODE = AUTH.CLIENT_SERVICE_PRI_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS C LIENT_SERVICE_PRI_DESC, AUTH.CLIENT_ASSESSMENT_DATE, AL.SERVICE_AUTHORIZED_DATE, AUTH.CASE_MANAGER_F_NAME, AUTH.CASE_MANAGER_L_NAME, AUTH.CASE_MANAGER_E_MAIL, P KG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(AL.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, TRUNC(AL.BEG_TIME), 1) BEG_RANGE, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(AL.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, TRUNC(AL.END_TIME), 1) END_RANGE FROM STX.AUTHORIZATIONS AUTH INNER JOIN STX.AUTH_LIMITS AL ON AUTH.AUTH_ID = AL. AUTH_ID LEFT JOIN STX.AUTH_TYPES AUTH_TYPE ON AUTH_TYPE.AUTH_TYPE_ID = AUTH.AUTH _TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN STX.AUTH_LIMIT_TYPES AUTHLIMITTYPE ON AUTHLIMITTYPE.AUTH_LIMI T_TYPE_ID = AUTH.AUTH_LIMIT_TYPE_ID WHERE (:B1 = 1 OR AUTH.ACCOUNT = :B11 ) AND AUTH.AUTH_STATUS_ID = 1 AND AL.BEG_TIME <= AL.END_TIME AND ( AUTH_LIMIT_ID NO T IN (2,3,4,5) OR ( PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(AL.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, TRUNC(AL.BEG_ TIME), 1) <= :B10 AND PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(AL.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, TRUNC(AL .END_TIME), 1) >= :B9 ) ) AND (:B8 IS NULL OR :B8 = AUTH.ACCOUNT) AND (:B7 IS NULL OR :B7 = AUTH.LOC) AND (:B6 IS NULL OR :B6 = AUTH.PAYOR_ID) AND (:B5 IS NU LL OR :B5 = AL.PROGRAM) AND (:B4 IS NULL OR :B4 = AL.SERVICE) AND (:B3 IS NULL O R :B3 = AUTH.AUTH_REF_NUMBER) AND (:B2 = 0 OR AUTH.LOC IN ( SELECT AUC.LOC FROM STX.APP_USERS_CLI AUC WHERE AUC.USER_ID = :B12 AND AUC.ACCOUNT = AUTH.ACCOUNT UN ION SELECT X.LOC FROM STX.XREF_SERVICES X INNER JOIN STX.APP_USERS_WRK AUW ON AU W.STX_ID = X.STX_ID AND AUW.ACCOUNT = X.ACCOUNT WHERE AUW.USER_ID = :B12 AND SYS DATE BETWEEN X.BEG_DATE AND X.END_DATE) ) AND (:B1 = 0 OR AUTH.ACCOUNT IN (SELEC T * FROM TABLE(:B13 ))) AND (:B1 = 0 OR (AUTH.ACCOUNT, AUTH.PAYOR_ID) IN ( SELEC T DISTINCT CASE WHEN CHILDCONTRACT.CONTRACT = :B15 THEN PARENTACCOUNT.ACCOUNT EL SE CHILDACCOUNT.ACCOUNT END AS ACCOUNT ,CASE WHEN CHILDCONTRACT.CONTRACT = :B15 THEN PARENTCONTRACT.CONTRACT ELSE CHILDCONTRACT.CONTRACT END AS CONTRACT FROM ST X.APP_DATA_SCOPES CHILDSCOPE INNER JOIN INBOX.LOGINS L ON L.SESSION_ID = :B14 IN NER JOIN STX.APP_USERS_DATA_SCOPES USERSCOPES ON USERSCOPES.USER_ID = L.USER_ID AND USERSCOPES.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_S COPES_SETUP CHILDACCOUNT ON CHILDACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_I D LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SETUP_CNT CHILDCONTRACT ON CHILDCONTRACT.DATA_SC OPE_SETUP_ID = CHILDACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SE TUP PARENTCONTRACT.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID = PARENTACCOUNT.DATA_ SCOPE_SETUP_ID WHERE CHILDCONTRACT.CONTRACT IS NOT NULL ) OR AUTH.ACCOUNT IN (SE LECT * FROM TABLE(:B16 ))) AND (:B1 = 0 OR (AUTH.ACCOUNT, AL.PROGRAM) IN ( SELEC T DISTINCT CASE WHEN CHILDPROGRAM.PROGRAM = :B15 THEN PARENTACCOUNT.ACCOUNT ELSE CHILDACCOUNT.ACCOUNT END AS ACCOUNT ,CASE WHEN CHILDPROGRAM.PROGRAM = :B15 THEN PARENTPROGRAM.PROGRAM ELSE CHILDPROGRAM.PROGRAM END AS PROGRAM FROM STX.APP_DAT A_SCOPES CHILDSCOPE INNER JOIN INBOX.LOGINS L ON L.SESSION_ID = :B14 INNER JOIN STX.APP_USERS_DATA_SCOPES USERSCOPES ON USERSCOPES.USER_ID = L.USER_ID AND USERS COPES.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SET UP CHILDACCOUNT ON CHILDACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_ID LEFT PARENTACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.PDATA_SCOPE_ID AND PARENTACCO UNT.ACCOUNT = CHILDACCOUNT.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SETUP_PRG PAREN TPROGRAM ON PARENTPROGRAM.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID = PARENTACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_I D WHERE CHILDPROGRAM.PROGRAM IS NOT NULL) OR AUTH.ACCOUNT IN (SELECT * FROM TABL E(:B17 ))) AND (:B1 = 0 OR (AUTH.ACCOUNT, AL.SERVICE) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN CHILDSERVICE.SERVICE = :B15 THEN PARENTACCOUNT.ACCOUNT ELSE CHILDACCOUNT.AC COUNT END AS ACCOUNT , CASE WHEN CHILDSERVICE.SERVICE = :B15 THEN PARENTSERVICE. SERVICE ELSE CHILDSERVICE.SERVICE END AS SERVICE FROM STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES CHILDS COPE INNER JOIN INBOX.LOGINS L ON L.SESSION_ID = :B14 INNER JOIN STX.APP_USERS_D ATA_SCOPES USERSCOPES ON USERSCOPES.USER_ID = L.USER_ID AND USERSCOPES.DATA_SCOP E_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SETUP CHILDACCOUNT ON CHILDACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.DATA_SCOPE_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA _SCOPES_SETUP_SRV CHILDSERVICE ON CHILDSERVICE.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID = CHILDACCOUN T.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SETUP PARENTACCOUNT ON PAREN TACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_ID = CHILDSCOPE.PDATA_SCOPE_ID AND PARENTACCOUNT.ACCOUNT = C HILDACCOUNT.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN STX.APP_DATA_SCOPES_SETUP_SRV PARENTSERVICE ON PAR ENTSERVICE.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID = PARENTACCOUNT.DATA_SCOPE_SETUP_ID WHERE CHILDSE RVICE.SERVICE IS NOT NULL ) OR AUTH.ACCOUNT IN (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B18 ))) ), ALL_AUTHS AS ( SELECT MQ.* ,:B9 AS PERIOD_BEG_DATE ,:B10 AS PERIOD_END_DATE ,PKG _AUTH_V8.GETVERIFIED(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG _DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, :B10 ))) AS VERIFIED ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPENDIN G(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, :B10 ))) AS PENDING ,MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_MAX - PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIFI ED(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, :B10 ))) AS DIFF ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETAUTHSTATUS(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LO C, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, : B10 ))) AS AUTH_STATUS ,0 AS "LEVEL" FROM MAIN_QUERY MQ WHERE AUTH_LIM IT_TYPE_ID = 1 AND (:B22 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.F_NAME) LIKE (UPPER(:B22 ) || '%')) AND (:B21 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.L_NAME) LIKE (UPPER(:B21 ) || '%')) AND (:B20 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.SPV) LIKE (UPPER(:B20 ) || '%')) AND (:B19 IS NULL OR :B19 = -1 OR :B19 = MQ.INCLUDE) UNION SELECT MQ.* ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_L IMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AU TH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIFIED(MQ.ACC OUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, G REATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_I D, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPENDING(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.L OC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B 9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATES T(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,TRUNC((MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_MAX) - (PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIF IED(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_L IMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AU TH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL))), 2) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETAUTHSTATU S(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIM IT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH _LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,LEVEL FROM MAIN_QUERY MQ WHERE AUTH_LIMIT_TYPE_ID = 2 AND (:B22 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.F_NAME) LIKE (UPPER(:B22 ) || '%')) AND (:B21 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.L_NAME) LIKE (UPPER(:B21 ) || '%')) AND ( :B20 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.SPV) LIKE (UPPER(:B20 ) || '%')) AND (:B19 IS NULL OR : B19 = -1 OR :B19 = MQ.INCLUDE) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= PKG_AUTH_V8.GETDAYSINPERIO D(GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, :B10 ))) AND PRIOR A UTH_LIMIT_ID = AUTH_LIMIT_ID AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT MQ.* ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEV EL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIFIED(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_ V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_A UTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) , PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPENDING(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERI ODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GET PERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,MQ.AUTH_LI MIT_MAX - PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIFIED(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH _V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_ AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETAUTHSTATUS(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GET PERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8 .GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,LEVEL FROM MAIN_QUERY MQ WHERE AUTH_LIMIT_TYPE_ID = 3 AND (:B22 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.F_ NAME) LIKE (UPPER(:B22 ) || '%')) AND (:B21 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.L_NAME) LIKE (UP PER(:B21 ) || '%')) AND (:B20 IS NULL OR UPPER(MQ.SPV) LIKE (UPPER(:B20 ) || '%' )) AND (:B19 IS NULL OR :B19 = -1 OR :B19 = MQ.INCLUDE) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= P KG_AUTH_V8.GETWEEKSINPERIOD(MQ.ACCOUNT, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEAST(:B10 ,NVL(MQ.END_DATE, :B10 ))) AND PRIOR AUTH_LIMIT_ID = AUTH_LIMIT_ID AND PRIOR SYS _GUID() IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT MQ.* ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMI T_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_ LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETVERIFIED(MQ.ACCOUN T, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREA TEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPENDING(MQ.ACCOUNT, MQ.LOC, MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODBEGDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(:B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL), PKG_AUTH_V8.GETPERIODENDDATE(MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_ID, GREATEST(: B9 , MQ.BEG_DATE), LEVEL)) ,MQ.AUTH_LIMIT_MAX - DUTY_FREE ) AS SCH_HOURS ,LIB.DIFFHOURS(V.BEG_CALL_DTIME, V.END_CALL_DTIME) AS A CT_HOURS ,C.LOC ,C.TTX_FLAG ,NVL(NVL(W.STX_ID, V.STX_ID), S.STX_ID) AS STX_ID ,W .ATT_ID ,RPAD(NVL(C.SPV,' '),3) AS SPV ,COALESCE(V.PAYOR_ID, S.CONTRACT, P.CONTR ACT ) AS CONTRACT ,S.CTRL_NUM ,S.DISCIPLINE ,COALESCE(V.SERVICE, S.SERVICE, P.SE RVICE ) AS SERVICE ,S.FLAG ,S.VISIT_TYPE ,S.LI_CASE ,P.CASENUM ,P.CASESEQ ,C.L_N AME ,C.F_NAME ,V.WORKERKEY ,V.CLIENTKEY ,V.ANI ,W.DEPT ,S.DUTY_FREE ,S.PROC_CODE ,COALESCE(V.PROGRAM, P.NURSING_PROGRAM ) AS NURSING_PROGRAM ,S.BILLCODE ,S.PROC _CODE_QUALIFIER ,S.OT_AB_HOURS GETEXPLAIN(VIS2_EXPLAIN, 19), 1, 0, 1) AS BILL_VISIT , STX.LIB.GETVISITSTATUS_CU STOM(V.VISITKEY) AS VISIT_STATUS , STX.LIB.GETVISITBILLUNITS(V.VISITKEY) AS BILL _UNITS , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS2_EXPLAIN, 14), 1, 1, 0) AS CLIENT_VERIF IED_TIMES , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS2_EXPLAIN, 17), 1, 1, 0) AS CLIENT_VE RIFIED_SERVICE , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS2_EXPLAIN, 21), 1, 1, 0) AS CLIE NT_SIGNATURE_AVAILABLE , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS1_EXPLAIN, 23), 1, 1, 0) AS CLIENT_VOICE_RECORDING , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS1_EXPLAIN, 27), 1, 1 , 0) AS CLIENT_VOICE_VERIFICATION , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS1_EXPLAIN, 22 ), 1, 1, 0) AS EMPLOYEE_VOICE_RECORDING , DECODE(STX.LIB.GETEXPLAIN(V.VIS1_EXPLA IN, 27), 1, 1, 0) AS EMPLOYEE_VOICE_VERIFICATION , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY V.VISITKEY ORDER BY V.VISLOGKEY DESC) AS RN , W.ATT_ID , WS.WORKER_ID_CUSTOM1 , NVL( (SELECT SERVICE_CODE FROM STX.ACCOUNTS_SERVICES AC WHERE AC.ACCOUNT = V. ACCOUNT AND AC.SERVICE = V.SERVICE AND ROWNUM = 1) , V.SERVICE) AS PROC_CODE FRO M STX.VISITS_LOG V INNER JOIN ALL_EXPORTS EA3 ON EA3.VISITKEY = V.VISITKEY LEFT JOIN STX.CLIENTS CLI3 ON V.CLIENTKEY = CLI3.CLIENTKEY INNER JOIN STX.ACCOUNTS_IN TERFACES AI ON V.ACCOUNT = AI.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN STX.WORKERS W ON V.WORKERKEY = W .WORKERKEY LEFT JOIN STX.WORKERS_SUPP WS ON V.WORKERKEY = WS.WORKERKEY ) DETAILS WHERE DETAILS.RN <= 3 WITH ALL_EXPORTS AS (SELECT /*+material ize*/ * FROM (SELECT [...]

(+) (-) select to_char(sysdate,' MM/DD/YY') as Run_Date, 'CLAIMS TOTALS' as DataSet, NVL(RSP.account, 'NO ACCT FOUND') as EVV_Acct, count(*) as TOTAL_CLAIMS, sum(CASE WHEN RSP.intf_rsp_txn_qlfr = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) as MATCHED, sum(CASE WHEN RSP.intf_rsp_txn_qlfr = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) as NOT_MATCHED, min(CASE WHEN RSP.intf_rsp_txn_qlfr = 'SUCCESS' THEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REQ.INTF_REQ_ID,-2,2)||'-01-20'||SUBSTR(REQ.INTF_REQ_ID,-4,2 ), 'MM-DD-YYYY') ELSE null END ) as FIRST_MATCH, RSP.PAYER_NAME from IODATA.INTF_RSP_TXN_Claim_Stack RSP, IODATA.INTF_REQ_TXN REQ where REQ.INTF_REQ_TXN_ID = RSP.INTF_REQ_TXN_ID and LENGTH(REQ.INTF_REQ_ID) = 19 and RSP.rec_create_tmstp >= '15-may-2022' and RSP.rec_create_tmstp < '31-dec-2099' and RSP.payer_name like 'CA%' group by to_char(sysdate,'MM/DD/YY'), 'CLAIMS_TOTALS', NVL(RSP.account, 'NO ACCT FOUND'), RSP.PAYER_NAME order by 1,2,3 select to_char(sysdate,'MM/DD/YY') as R un_Date, 'CLAIMS TOTA [...]

NTERFACES AI ON AI.ACCOUNT = A.ACCOUNT ) ,CLAIM_DATA AS ( SELECT REQ.REC_CREATE_ TMSTP AS REQ_REC_CREATE_TMSTP ,REQ.INTF_REQ_ID AS REQ_INTF_REQ_ID ,RSP_TXN.INTF_ REQ_TXN_ID AS REQ_INTF_REQ_TXN_ID ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.ICN AS REQ_ICN ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.D LN AS DLN ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM.PROVIDER_ID AS REQ_PROVIDER_ID ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.LOC AS RE Q_LOC ,(SELECT MAX(CLIENTKEY) FROM STX.CLIENTS_SUPP CS WHERE CS.MEDICAID_ID=RSP_ TXN_CLAIM.CLIENT_ID AND RSP_TXN_CLAIM.CLIENT_ID_QLFR = 'MedicaidID') AS CLIENTKE Y ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM.VISIT_BEG_CALL_DTIME AS REQ_VISIT_BEG_CALL_DTIME ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM .VISIT_END_CALL_DTIME AS REQ_VISIT_END_CALL_DTIME ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM.PAYER_NAME AS R EQ_PAYER_NAME ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM.SVC AS REQ_SVC_ ,COALESCE ((SELECT PDV.PROC_CODE FR OM STX.PAYOR_DATA_VALIDATION PDV WHERE PDV.SERVICE = REQ_TXN_CLAIM.SVC AND ROWNU M = 1), (SELECT AS2.SERVICE FROM STX.ACCOUNTS_SERVICES AS2 WHERE AS2.SERVICE = R EQ_TXN_CLAIM.SVC AND ROWNUM = 1),REQ_TXN_CLAIM.SVC) AS REQ_SVC ,REQ_TXN_CLAIM.BI LL_UNIT_COUNT AS REQ_BILL_UNIT_COUNT ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_RSP_TXN_QLFR AS INTF_RS P_TXN_QLFR ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.PROVIDER_ID AS RSP_PROVIDER_ID ,COALESCE(RSP_TXN_CLAIM .ACCOUNT, REPGEN.JLIB.LOOKUPACCOUNTFORCLAIM(RSP_TXN_CLAIM.PROVIDER_ID, RSP_TXN_C LAIM.VISITKEY)) AS RSP_ACCOUNT ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.CLIENT_ID AS MEDICAID_ID_OTHER ,CA SE WHEN (RSP_TXN_CLAIM.VISITKEY IS NULL OR RSP_TXN_CLAIM.VISITKEY=0) THEN 0 ELSE RSP_TXN_CLAIM.BILL_UNIT_COUNT END AS RSP_BILL_UNIT_COUNT ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.VISITKE Y AS VISITKEY ,RSP_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_RSP_TXN_NOTE AS INTF_RSP_TXN_NOTE ,RSP_TXN_CLA IM.INTF_RSP_TXN_NOTE_DETAIL AS INTF_RSP_TXN_NOTE_DETAIL FROM IODATA.INTF_REQ REQ INNER JOIN IODATA.INTF_RSP RSP ON RSP.INTF_REQ_ID = REQ.INTF_REQ_ID AND REQ.INT F_REQ_SK = RSP.INTF_REQ_SK INNER JOIN IODATA.INTF_RSP_TXN RSP_TXN ON RSP.INTF_RS P_SK = RSP_TXN.INTF_RSP_SK INNER JOIN IODATA.INTF_RSP_TXN_CLAIM_STACK RSP_TXN_CL AIM ON RSP_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_RSP_TXN_SK = RSP_TXN.INTF_RSP_TXN_SK INNER JOIN IODATA .INTF_REQ_TXN_CLAIM_STACK REQ_TXN_CLAIM ON REQ_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_REQ_TXN_CLAIM_STAC K_SK = RSP_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_REQ_TXN_CLAIM_STACK_SK WHERE REQ_TXN_CLAIM.REC_CREATE_ TMSTP BETWEEN :B3 AND :B2 AND RSP_TXN_CLAIM.INTF_RSP_EXCP_ID > 0 ) SELECT CD. REQ_REC_CREATE_TMSTP, CD.REQ_INTF_REQ_ID, CD.REQ_INTF_REQ_TXN_ID, CD.REQ_ICN, CD .DLN, CD.REQ_PROVIDER_ID, COALESCE(CD.REQ_LOC,(SELECT LOC FROM STX.CLIENTS CLK W HERE CLK.CLIENTKEY=CD.CLIENTKEY)) AS REQ_LOC, CD.REQ_VISIT_BEG_CALL_DTIME, CD.RE Q_VISIT_END_CALL_DTIME, COALESCE(CD.REQ_PAYER_NAME, V.PAYOR_ID, S.CONTRACT,P.CON TRACT) AS REQ_PAYER_NAME, COALESCE(V.PROGRAM, S.PROGRAM, P.NURSING_PROGRAM) AS V ISIT_PROGRAM, COALESCE(CD.REQ_SVC, V.SERVICE, S.SERVICE, P.SERVICE) AS REQ_SVC, CD.REQ_BILL_UNIT_COUNT, CD.INTF_RSP_TXN_QLFR, CD.RSP_PROVIDER_ID, CD.RSP_ACCOUNT , SA.COMPNAME, CD.MEDICAID_ID_OTHER, CASE WHEN C.F_NAME IS NULL THEN (SELECT DIS TINCT CL.F_NAME FROM STX.CLIENTS CL WHERE CL.CLIENTKEY=CD.CLIENTKEY) ELSE C.F_NA ME END AS CLIENT_F_NAME, CASE WHEN C.L_NAME IS NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT CL.L_N AME FROM STX.CLIENTS CL WHERE CL.CLIENTKEY=CD.CLIENTKEY) ELSE C.L_NAME END AS CL IENT_L_NAME, CD.RSP_BILL_UNIT_COUNT, CD.VISITKEY, CD.INTF_RSP_TXN_NOTE, CD.INTF_ RSP_TXN_NOTE_DETAIL FROM CLAIM_DATA CD, STX.VISITS V, STX.SCHEDULE S, STX.CLIENT S C, STX.CLIENTS_SUPP P, SELECTED_ACCOUNTS SA WHERE CD.VISITKEY = V.VISITKEY (+) AND CD.RSP_ACCOUNT = SA.ACCOUNT AND V.SCHKEY = S.SCHKEY (+) AND V.CLIENTKEY = C .CLIENTKEY (+) AND V.CLIENTKEY = P.CLIENTKEY (+) AND ( (:B5 = :B7 AND COALESCE(C D.REQ_PAYER_NAME, V.PAYOR_ID, S.CONTRACT,P.CONTRACT) IN (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B8 ))) OR COALESCE(CD.REQ_PAYER_NAME, V.PAYOR_ID, S.CONTRACT,P.CONTRACT) IN (SELEC T * FROM TABLE(:B9 )) ) AND ( (:B5 = :B6 ) OR (COALESCE(V.PROGRAM, S.PROGRAM, P. NURSING_PROGRAM) IN (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B10 ))) ) AND ( (:B5 = :B4 ) OR (COALE SCE(CD.REQ_SVC, V.SERVICE, S.SERVICE, P.SERVICE) IN (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B11 )) ) ) WITH SELECTED_ACCOUNTS AS ( SELECT A.AC COUNT ,A.COMPNAME ,AI [...]

(+) (-) SELECT * FROM (SELECT cl ient_name,worker_name,visit_date,b_dtime,e_dtime,beg_call_dtime,end_call_dtime,c lientkey,visitkey,workerkey,schkey,loc,stx_id,stx.lib.FormatSantraxId(stx_id,acc ount) formatted_stx_id,update_id,vis_explain,vis1_explain,vis2_explain,sch_hours _char,pay_hours_char,act_hours_char,memo,memo_column,client_unknown,excp_explain ,spv,category,contract,task_count,ot_ab_code,client_phone,worker_phone,worker_un known,gps_phone_type,addressvalidation,bill_hours_char,beg_adj_dtime,end_adj_dti me,service,service_description,excp1_explain,ot_ab_hours_char,medicaid_id,compna me,adj_hours_char,visit_status,call_in_location,call_out_location,payor_id,payor _name,program,stx.lib.GetVisitTzName(visitkey) as timezone,excp1_ack_explain,exc p_ack_explain, ani, NVL(beg_call_dtime, end_call_dtime) AS call_dtime, bill_unit s ,visit_group_code,visit_group_guid, contgy_plan_code, sch_explain, jurisdictio n_id, jurisdiction_desc, OfflineInd, worker_id_custom1 ,lib.DecodeExcpExplain(ex cp_explain, NULL, excp1_explain) AS excp_order,att_id, count(*) OVER () AS total _rows, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dti me,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj _dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,end_call_dtime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) ) AS row_number FROM ( SELECT /*+ index(v visits_pk) leading(x) use_nl(x v) */ v.visitkey, v.account, v.schkey, v.clientkey, v.workerkey, v.vis_explain, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain, nvl(v.update_id,0) AS update_id, v.visit_date, v.visit_edate, s.b_dtime, s.e_dtime, v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.pay_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(stx.lib.schedhours(s.b_dtime,s.e_dtime,s.duty_free) ,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS sch_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectoc(lib.diffhours(v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.vi sitkey) ),1,5) AS act_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.pay_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS pay_hours_char , substr(stx.lib.getfullname(c.f_name,c.l_name,stx.lib.getphonenum(v.ani) ),1, 64) AS client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, cs.client_priority, w.stx_id, w.att_id, nvl(TO_CHAR(w.phonenum),ws.phone) AS worker_phone, c.spv, nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) AS contract, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcp1explain( v.excp1_explain, v.vis2_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp1_mask(v.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.ser vice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp1_explain, v.visit_group_code, v.visit_group_guid, s.ctrl_num as sch_ctrl_num, s.contgy_plan_code, s.sch_explain, x.jurisdiction_id, CASE WHEN x.jurisdiction_id IS NOT NULL THEN stx.lib.getJurisdictionDesc(stx.lib.GetBE_Guid(x.account), x.jurisdictio n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.beg_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_in_location, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.end_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_out_location FROM stx.gtt_vm_visits x JOIN stx.visits v ON v.visitkey=x.visitkey JOIN stx.accounts_info a ON v.account = a.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_interfaces ai ON v.account = ai.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_setup acs ON v.account = acs.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_proc ap ON v.account = ap.account LEFT JOIN stx.schedule s ON v.schkey = s.schkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers w ON v.workerkey = w.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers_supp ws ON v.workerkey = ws.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients c ON v.clientkey = c.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients_supp cs ON v.clientkey = cs.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.payor p on p.payor_id=x.payor_id WHERE stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='2070' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2024-10-31 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2024-11-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_edate >= to_date('2024-11-01 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_status NOT IN ('Ignored') AND (excp_explain <> 0 OR excp1_expl ain <> 0) ORDER BY visit_date LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_a dj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dtime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name ) ) AS row_number FROM ( SELECT /*+ index(v visits_pk) leading(x) use_nl(x v) */ v.visitkey, v.account, v.schkey, v.clientkey, v.workerkey, v.vis_explain, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain, nvl(v.update_id,0) AS update_id, v.visit_date, v.visit_edate, s.b_dtime, s.e_dtime, v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.pay_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(stx.lib.schedhours(s.b_dtime,s.e_dtime,s.duty_free) ,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS sch_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectoc(lib.diffhours(v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.vi sitkey) ),1,5) AS act_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.pay_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS pay_hours_char , substr(stx.lib.getfullname(c.f_name,c.l_name,stx.lib.getphonenum(v.ani) ),1, 64) AS client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, cs.client_priority, w.stx_id, w.att_id, nvl(TO_CHAR(w.phonenum),ws.phone) AS worker_phone, c.spv, nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) AS contract, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='84349' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2025-01-14 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2025-01-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD (+) (-) WITH SELECTED_ACCOUNTS A S ( SELECT COLUMN_VALUE AS ACCOUNT, A.COMPNAME, JLIB.GETPROVIDERID(A.ACCOUNT) AS PROVIDER_ID FROM (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B1 )) T JOIN ACCOUNTS A ON T.COLUMN_VALU E = A.ACCOUNT ), SELECTED_CLIENTS AS ( SELECT C.ACCOUNT ,C.CLIENTKEY ,C.LOC ,CAS E WHEN P.MEDICAID_ID IS NOT NULL THEN P.MEDICAID_ID WHEN (LIB.GETEXPLAIN(NVL(C.C LI_EXPLAIN, 0), 4) = 1) THEN 'N' ELSE JLIB.GETCLIENTIDOTHER(C.ACCOUNT, C.LOC, :B 3 , :B4 ) END AS MEDICAID_ID ,P.MEDICAID_ID_OTHER ,C.L_NAME AS CLIENT_F_NAME ,C. F_NAME AS CLIENT_L_NAME FROM STX.CLIENTS C, STX.CLIENTS_SUPP P, SELECTED_ACCOUNT S A WHERE C.ACCOUNT = A.ACCOUNT AND C.BEG_DATE < :B4 AND C.END_DATE > :B3 AND C.CLIENTKEY = P.CLIENTKEY(+) AND (:B2 NOT IN (3) OR (C.CLIENTKEY IN (SELECT * FROM TABLE(:B5 )))) ), APP_ACCESS_LOG_1 AS ( SELECT AL.REQ_BEG_DATE ,AL.REQ_EN D_DATE ,AL.MODULE_NAME ,AL.DESCRIPTION AS ACCESS_DESC ,AL.INSERT_TMSTP ,AL.APPAC CLOGKEY ,AL.SESSION_ID ,AL.PRIVKEY ,AL.ACCOUNT FROM STX.APP_ACCESS_LOG AL, SELEC TED_ACCOUNTS A WHERE AL.ACCOUNT = A.ACCOUNT AND STX.DSINTERVAL.DATE_TO_UTC(AL.IN SERT_TMSTP, :B6 ) BETWEEN :B3 AND :B4 ) SELECT A.COMPNAME ,A.ACCOUNT ,C.CLIENTKE Y ,C.LOC ,A.PROVIDER_ID ,C.MEDICAID_ID ,C.MEDICAID_ID_OTHER ,C.CLIENT_F_NAME ,C. CLIENT_L_NAME ,AU.USERNAME ,AU.USER_F_NAME ,AU.USER_L_NAME ,L.LOGIN_TMSTP ,L.LOG OUT_TMSTP ,AL.REQ_BEG_DATE ,AL.REQ_END_DATE ,AL.MODULE_NAME ,AP.DESCRIPTION AS P RIV_DESC ,AL.ACCESS_DESC ,AL.INSERT_TMSTP ,AL.APPACCLOGKEY FROM APP_ACCESS_LOG_1 AL, STX.APP_ACCESS_LOG_DETL ALD, INBOX.LOGINS L, STX.APP_USERS AU, STX.APP_PRIV S AP, SELECTED_CLIENTS C, SELECTED_ACCOUNTS A WHERE ALD.APPACCLOGKEY = AL.APPACC LOGKEY AND AL.SESSION_ID = L.SESSION_ID AND AU.USER_ID = L.USER_ID AND AU.USERNA ME <> 'SITESCOPE@SANDATA.COM' AND AP.PRIVKEY = AL.PRIVKEY AND C.ACCOUNT = AL.ACCOUNT AND C.LOC = ALD.LOC AND A.ACCOUNT = AU.ACCOUNT WITH SELECTED_ACCOUNTS AS ( SELECT COLU MN_VALUE AS ACCOUNT, [...]

(+) (-) SELECT * FROM (SELECT cl ient_name,worker_name,visit_date,b_dtime,e_dtime,beg_call_dtime,end_call_dtime,c lientkey,visitkey,workerkey,schkey,loc,stx_id,stx.lib.FormatSantraxId(stx_id,acc ount) formatted_stx_id,update_id,vis_explain,vis1_explain,vis2_explain,sch_hours _char,pay_hours_char,act_hours_char,memo,memo_column,client_unknown,excp_explain ,spv,category,contract,task_count,ot_ab_code,client_phone,worker_phone,worker_un known,gps_phone_type,addressvalidation,bill_hours_char,beg_adj_dtime,end_adj_dti me,service,service_description,excp1_explain,ot_ab_hours_char,medicaid_id,compna me,adj_hours_char,visit_status,call_in_location,call_out_location,payor_id,payor _name,program,stx.lib.GetVisitTzName(visitkey) as timezone,excp1_ack_explain,exc p_ack_explain, ani, NVL(beg_call_dtime, end_call_dtime) AS call_dtime, bill_unit s ,visit_group_code,visit_group_guid, contgy_plan_code, sch_explain, jurisdictio n_id, jurisdiction_desc, OfflineInd, worker_id_custom1 ,lib.DecodeExcpExplain(ex cp_explain, NULL, excp1_explain) AS excp_order,att_id, count(*) OVER () AS total _rows, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dti me,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj _dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,end_call_dtime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) ) AS row_number FROM ( SELECT /*+ index(v visits_pk) leading(x) use_nl(x v) */ v.visitkey, v.account, v.schkey, v.clientkey, v.workerkey, v.vis_explain, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain, nvl(v.update_id,0) AS update_id, v.visit_date, v.visit_edate, s.b_dtime, s.e_dtime, v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.pay_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(stx.lib.schedhours(s.b_dtime,s.e_dtime,s.duty_free) ,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS sch_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectoc(lib.diffhours(v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.vi sitkey) ),1,5) AS act_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.pay_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS pay_hours_char , substr(stx.lib.getfullname(c.f_name,c.l_name,stx.lib.getphonenum(v.ani) ),1, 64) AS client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, cs.client_priority, w.stx_id, w.att_id, nvl(TO_CHAR(w.phonenum),ws.phone) AS worker_phone, c.spv, nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) AS contract, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcp1explain( v.excp1_explain, v.vis2_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp1_mask(v.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.ser vice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp1_explain, v.visit_group_code, v.visit_group_guid, s.ctrl_num as sch_ctrl_num, s.contgy_plan_code, s.sch_explain, x.jurisdiction_id, CASE WHEN x.jurisdiction_id IS NOT NULL THEN stx.lib.getJurisdictionDesc(stx.lib.GetBE_Guid(x.account), x.jurisdictio n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.beg_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_in_location, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.end_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_out_location FROM stx.gtt_vm_visits x JOIN stx.visits v ON v.visitkey=x.visitkey JOIN stx.accounts_info a ON v.account = a.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_interfaces ai ON v.account = ai.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_setup acs ON v.account = acs.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_proc ap ON v.account = ap.account LEFT JOIN stx.schedule s ON v.schkey = s.schkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers w ON v.workerkey = w.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers_supp ws ON v.workerkey = ws.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients c ON v.clientkey = c.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients_supp cs ON v.clientkey = cs.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.payor p on p.payor_id=x.payor_id WHERE stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='2070' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2024-10-31 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2024-11-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_edate >= to_date('2024-11-01 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_status NOT IN ('Ignored') AND (excp_explain <> 0 OR excp1_expl ain <> 0) ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call _dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dt ime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) , visitkey ) a WHERE row _number BETWEEN 1 AND 50 SELECT * FROM (SELECT client_name,worke r_name,visit_date,b_d [...]

(+) (-) SELECT loc FROM (SELECT client_name,worker_name,visit_date,b_dtime,e_dtime,beg_call_dtime,end_call_dtime ,clientkey,visitkey,workerkey,schkey,loc,stx_id,stx.lib.FormatSantraxId(stx_id,a ccount) formatted_stx_id,update_id,vis_explain,vis1_explain,vis2_explain,sch_hou rs_char,pay_hours_char,act_hours_char,memo,memo_column,client_unknown,excp_expla in,spv,category,contract,task_count,ot_ab_code,client_phone,worker_phone,worker_ unknown,gps_phone_type,addressvalidation,bill_hours_char,beg_adj_dtime,end_adj_d time,service,service_description,excp1_explain,ot_ab_hours_char,medicaid_id,comp name,adj_hours_char,visit_status,call_in_location,call_out_location,payor_id,pay or_name,program,stx.lib.GetVisitTzName(visitkey) as timezone,excp1_ack_explain,e xcp_ack_explain, ani, NVL(beg_call_dtime, end_call_dtime) AS call_dtime, bill_un its ,visit_group_code,visit_group_guid, contgy_plan_code, sch_explain, jurisdict ion_id, jurisdiction_desc, OfflineInd, worker_id_custom1 ,lib.DecodeExcpExplain( excp_explain, NULL, excp1_explain) AS excp_order,att_id, count(*) OVER () AS tot al_rows, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_d time,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_a dj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dtime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name ) ) AS row_number FROM ( SELECT /*+ index(v visits_pk) leading(x) use_nl(x v) */ v.visitkey, v.account, v.schkey, v.clientkey, v.workerkey, v.vis_explain, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain, nvl(v.update_id,0) AS update_id, v.visit_date, v.visit_edate, s.b_dtime, s.e_dtime, v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.pay_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(stx.lib.schedhours(s.b_dtime,s.e_dtime,s.duty_free) ,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS sch_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectoc(lib.diffhours(v.beg_call_dtime, v.end_call_dtime, v.vi sitkey) ),1,5) AS act_hours_char, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.pay_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS pay_hours_char , substr(stx.lib.getfullname(c.f_name,c.l_name,stx.lib.getphonenum(v.ani) ),1, 64) AS client_name, substr(stx.lib.getfullname(w.f_name,w.l_name,stx.lib.formatstx_id(v.stx_id,a p.id_ssn) ),1,64) AS worker_name, v.ani, c.loc, stx.lib.getanianipri(v.clientkey) AS client_phone, cs.client_priority, w.stx_id, w.att_id, nvl(TO_CHAR(w.phonenum),ws.phone) AS worker_phone, c.spv, nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) AS contract, substr(stx.lib.getcategory(v.account,nvl(s.contract,cs.contract) ),1,10) AS category, w.dept, s.duty_free, s.flag, v.memo, substr(stx.lib.getmemocolumn(v.visitkey),1,3) AS memo_column, v.task_count, DECODE(nvl(v.clientkey,0),0,1,0) AS client_unknown, DECODE(nvl(v.workerkey,0),0,1,0) AS worker_unknown, ltrim(s.ot_ab_code) AS ot_ab_code, CASE WHEN nvl(s.ot_ab_hours,0) = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE substr(stx.lib.sectochar(s.ot_ab_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) END AS ot_ab_hours_char, w.gps_phone_type, cs.addressvalidation, v.bill_hours, substr(stx.lib.sectochar(v.bill_hours,ai.hours_fr,'0'),1,5) AS bill_hours_ch ar, CASE WHEN acs.bill_unit_enabled = '1' THEN stx.lib.getvisitbillunits(v.visitk ey) ELSE NULL END AS bill_units, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, x.service, ( SELECT description FROM stx.accounts_services srv WHERE srv.account = v.account AND srv.service = x.service AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS service_description, nvl(cs.medicaid_id,cs.ar_no) AS medicaid_id, a.compname, substr(lib.sectoc(stx.lib.diffhours(v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, v.visi tkey) ),1,5) AS adj_hours_char, stx.lib.getvisitstatus_custom( p_visitkey => v.visitkey, p_payor_id => x.payor_id, p_program => x.program, p_service => x.service ) AS visit_status, x.payor_id, p.payor_name, x.program, v.excp_ack_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcpexplain( stx.lib.setexplain( v.excp_explain, 21, stx.lib.getnoshowexception(v.visitkey) ), v.vis_explain, v.excp_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp_mask(x.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.se rvice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp_explain, CASE WHEN NVL(s.b_dtime, v.visit_date) > stx.dsinterval.tz_date( SYSDATE, 'US/Eastern', NVL(s.tzname,stx.lib.getVisitTZName(v.visitkey)) ) THEN 0 ELSE stx.lib.checkexplain( stx.lib.transformexcp1explain( v.excp1_explain, v.vis2_explain, v.excp1_ack_explain, v.beg_adj_dtime, v.end_adj_dtime, 1 ), stx.lib.getexcp1_mask(v.visitkey,x.account,x.payor_id,x.program,x.ser vice,x.visit_date) ) END AS excp1_explain, v.visit_group_code, v.visit_group_guid, s.ctrl_num as sch_ctrl_num, s.contgy_plan_code, s.sch_explain, x.jurisdiction_id, CASE WHEN x.jurisdiction_id IS NOT NULL THEN stx.lib.getJurisdictionDesc(stx.lib.GetBE_Guid(x.account), x.jurisdictio n_id, x.visit_date) ELSE NULL END AS jurisdiction_desc, stx.lib.GetVisitOfflineInd(null, v.vis1_explain, v.vis2_explain) AS OfflineI nd, ws.worker_id_custom1, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.beg_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_in_location, (SELECT c.call_location FROM stx.calls c WHERE lib.getexplain(ai.vm_options_ explain,19)=1 AND c.visitkey=v.visitkey AND c.call_dtime=v.end_call_dtime AND RO WNUM=1) AS call_out_location FROM stx.gtt_vm_visits x JOIN stx.visits v ON v.visitkey=x.visitkey JOIN stx.accounts_info a ON v.account = a.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_interfaces ai ON v.account = ai.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_setup acs ON v.account = acs.account LEFT JOIN stx.accounts_proc ap ON v.account = ap.account LEFT JOIN stx.schedule s ON v.schkey = s.schkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers w ON v.workerkey = w.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.workers_supp ws ON v.workerkey = ws.workerkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients c ON v.clientkey = c.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.clients_supp cs ON v.clientkey = cs.clientkey LEFT JOIN stx.payor p on p.payor_id=x.payor_id WHERE stx.lib.getexplain(nvl(v.vis_explain,0),19) = 0 ) WHERE account='2070' AND visit_date BETWEEN to_date('2024-10-31 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date('2024-11-15 23:59:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_edate >= to_date('2024-11-01 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND visit_status NOT IN ('Ignored') AND (excp_explain <> 0 OR excp1_expl ain <> 0) ORDER BY visit_date DESC,COALESCE(b_dtime,beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call _dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_call_dtime,beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DE SC NULLS LAST,COALESCE(beg_adj_dtime,end_call_dtime) DESC NULLS LAST,end_call_dt ime DESC NULLS LAST,client_unknown, UPPER(client_name) , visitkey ) a WHERE row _number BETWEEN 1 AND 50 AND loc IS NOT NULL SELECT loc FROM (SELECT client_name,wor ker_name,visit_date,b [...]
